runTitle: Production Cloud Run direct API post-deploy QA - v8.12.115 healthy TOP-N frame preservation
coveredSurfaces: GitLab tag pipeline 2583436598 succeeded for v8.12.115
Vercel production /api/version returned v8.12.115 and releaseTag v8.12.115
Cloud Run /health returned status ok and version 8.12.115
Cloud Run service limits remained cpu=1 and memory=512Mi
Cloud Run revision ai-engine-00613-vp4 receives 100% traffic
direct API healthy TOP3 prompt returned deterministic monitoring-server-health with 3 numbered items
direct API stable top-3 Korean prompt returned deterministic monitoring-server-health with 3 numbered items
direct API inverse healthy-status list retained deterministic monitoring-server-health full-list behavior
skippedSurfaces: Browser AI sidebar was not repeated because the changed runtime surface is Cloud Run supervisor routing and direct API covered the failing production path
Public snapshot sync was not requested

plannerShadowObservations.surface: direct API healthy TOP-N prompt pack
plannerShadowObservations.source: Cloud Run direct API response metadata and numbered item count

expertAssessments.rationale: The production direct API now preserves healthy-only TOP-N through the intent-frame path and keeps the inverse healthy full-list behavior intact.
GitLab release pipeline, Vercel version smoke, Cloud Run health, traffic, and free-tier resource limits were verified.
Direct API response metadata confirmed deterministic provider/model/finalAgent for the affected prompt pack.

usageChecks.summary: Cloud Run ai-engine stayed at cpu=1, memory=512Mi, and 100% traffic on revision ai-engine-00613-vp4 after v8.12.115 deployment.
usageChecks.evidence: gcloud run services describe ai-engine --region asia-northeast1 --format='value(status.latestReadyRevisionName,status.traffic[0].percent,status.traffic[0].revisionName,spec.template.spec.containers[0].resources.limits,status.url)'

artifacts.label: v8.12.115 healthy TOP-N post-deploy pass evidence

completedImprovements.title: Healthy-only server TOP-N queries preserve topN through semantic intent frame
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.12.115 production direct API returned deterministic monitoring-server-health with exactly 3 numbered items for both healthy TOP3 and stable top-3 Korean prompts.
completedImprovements.note: Fixed by restoring frame.topN as rankCount in the healthy-only server-health frame branch.

notes: Pre-fix v8.12.114 production smoke showed deterministic routing but 17 numbered items for healthy TOP3/stable top-3 prompts.
